name: llm-wiki-videos
description: Programmatic videos for LLM Wiki — marketing promos and app demos

scripts.render:marketing: npx remotion render src/index.ts MarketingPromo out/marketing-promo.mp4
scripts.render:demo: npx remotion render src/index.ts AppDemo out/app-demo.mp4
scripts.render:all: npm run render:marketing && npm run render:demo

author: Ronan Connolly
